title: FTX - Terms & Commissions
relevance_summary: User misidentified token due to lack of clear communication from exchange, leading to incorrect deposit.
red_flags: Lack of clear communication about token rebranding
Incorrect token label on exchange interface
summary: A user deposited USDP (Unit Protocol) thinking it was PAX (PAXOS) due to unclear communication from FTX regarding the token rebranding. This led to a misunderstanding and subsequent overcharge.
